description: Evolving population for the Varitea founding-loop search system. Each domain keeps survivors night-over-night; the cron mutates them and injects fresh candidates. Scores are 1-5 weighted; stop at >=4.0 or time box. Hard gate: caffeine-free fit required. All candidates must be grounded in sourced signal (no fabrication, no PII).
canonical_actor_note: Single source of truth for ground-truth mining. This actor IS our emerging ICP — the population it surfaces becomes the segment we build for. Do not swap or fan out without an explicit documented change. X/web actors are supplementary color only.
freeze_rule: If no fresh ground truth this run (canonical actor returned empty AND no new first-party complaints since last_run), FREEZE: carry prior winners + scores forward verbatim, do NOT mutate or inject, set last_run_ground_truth=false and frozen=true, and state plainly in the run log + PR + founder letter that scores are frozen and no progress is claimed. Only generate/score/mutate when fresh ground truth landed.
freeze_reason: Canonical actor trudax/reddit-scraper-lite timed out on 2026-05-29 and 2026-05-30; no fresh Reddit dataset ingested and no new first-party complaints. Scores shown below were advanced before the freeze rule existed and must NOT be treated as ground-truth-validated until a run with fresh signal re-scores them.
